source_jobs.title: Speculative Application
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US:

Saltz is an online food marketplace serving restaurants across multiple European markets. We help chefs and restaurants discover and source products from trusted local and international suppliers.


At Saltz, we believe the best ingredients should be accessible through one seamless marketplace experience. Restaurants purchase directly from Saltz and are fully supported across sales, logistics, customer support, account management, and claims handling. Through our catalogue and platform, we provide visibility into sourcing origins and product information, helping chefs make informed purchasing decisions and discover trusted suppliers worldwide.

We recently closed a €20M Series A backed by leading European venture funds. Our vision is to build the modern infrastructure layer for foodservice commerce - building the new standard for how the world sources food.




NOT FOUND A JOB OPENING THAT SUITS RIGHT NOW?


WE WOULD STILL LIKE TO HEAR FROM YOU!

Saltz Marketplace is scaling fast. Our needs change as quickly as the industry we are rewiring, so we keep the door open for engineers, entrepreneurs, and experts who want to build with us. We take exceptional people when they come along and we really mean that.

Build the modern food market: we are a remote-first team across the European Union, with a hub in Vilnius. Join us to own a piece of the mission, whether that’s rewiring logistics or scaling a marketplace that thousands of chefs and producers rely on in real-time.

Submit your CV and tell us your story:

 - What have you built or scaled that you’re proud of?

 - What are you capable of?

 - Why is Saltz your next chapter?

The process: we review our speculative talent pool as we scale. We might not reach out to everyone, but we definitely get in touch when we see a profile that can clearly move the needle for the company.



Saltz Marketplace, UAB http://Saltz.App is an equal opportunity employer. We respect and empower each individual who joins us. Saltz Marketplace, UAB http://Saltz.App commits to a transparent, inclusive, non-discriminatory recruitment process and employment.

source_jobs.title: Field Sales Executive (m/f/d) - Berlin
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US:

Saltz is an online food marketplace serving restaurants across multiple European markets. We help chefs and restaurants discover and source products from trusted local and international suppliers.


At Saltz, we believe the best ingredients should be accessible through one seamless marketplace experience. Restaurants purchase directly from Saltz and are fully supported across sales, logistics, customer support, account management, and claims handling. Through our catalogue and platform, we provide visibility into sourcing origins and product information, helping chefs make informed purchasing decisions and discover trusted suppliers worldwide.

We recently closed a €20M Series A backed by leading European venture funds. Our vision is to build the modern infrastructure layer for foodservice commerce - building the new standard for how the world sources food.



About the role:

Own Saltz.App http://Saltz.App expansion in your city! You’ll find and contact new venues, meet chefs and managers, show how the app works, and support their orders, from cozy lunch spots to Michelin-level places. We’ll train you, and give you room to own your day and your results.

You don't need a sales degree, you need grit, passion for gastronomy, and the drive to grow.



What your days will look like:

 - You’ll be out in the field, visiting restaurants and kitchens. Your mission is to introduce chefs and owners to a marketplace that actually makes their lives easier

 - You’ll manage about 10–15 meetings a week and you’ll be responsible for following up and making sure no one is left hanging

 - You will plan your weekly schedule and work towards hitting or exceeding targets

 - You’ll show chefs a demo of our application, in their own environment, how Saltz makes ordering simple and reliable

 - You’ll use our CRM and other tools to keep notes on your progress so the whole team can support you
   
   

What you need:

 - Whether you’ve run a kitchen, managed a bar, or worked as a concierge, you understand the fast-paced world of gastronomy

 - You already gained first sales experience, ideally in field sales and scale-ups

 - You’re energized by being out in the field, walking into kitchens, and building face-to-face relationships with chefs and managers

 - Very good oral and written German and English skills

 - You’re comfortable leading a conversation. You know how to listen, solve problems, and confidently seal the deal

 - Bonus: You speak other languages fluently in addition to German or English



What you get:

 - OTE 54.000€ - 58.000€+ and it is uncapped, so your earnings grow with your performance. Base: 42.000€ - 46.000€

 - 30 days of paid time off - because recharging is part of performing at your best

 - front-row access to the gastronomy world: from new restaurant openings and tastings to pop-up events, you'll be close in the industry you're selling to

 - The hardware you need to get started

 - A company card to cover commuting costs (€200 per month)

 - Autonomy and trust to manage your own workflow

 - Work with and be supported by mature, intelligent, entrepreneurial and fun people who are leading experts in their fields, driven by their passion for the industry

 - A great place to build your first sales career, as you'll learn by doing, hit real milestones, and have people around you who've done it before
   
   

Interview Process

We aim to keep our process fast, transparent, and focused on getting to know you.

 1. Intro Chat (30 min) – A conversation with our Talent Acquisition Manager to learn more about you, your motivations, and what you're looking for next.

 2. Deep Dive (60 min) – A discussion with our Head of Sales to explore your previous experience, sales approach, and how you think about building and growing revenue.

 3. Offer 🎉 – If everything aligns, we’ll move quickly with an offer and welcome you to the team.

Saltz Marketplace, UAB http://Saltz.App is an equal opportunity employer. We respect

source_jobs.title: Junior Field Sales Executive (m/f/d) - Berlin
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US:

Saltz is an online food marketplace serving restaurants across multiple European markets. We help chefs and restaurants discover and source products from trusted local and international suppliers.


At Saltz, we believe the best ingredients should be accessible through one seamless marketplace experience. Restaurants purchase directly from Saltz and are fully supported across sales, logistics, customer support, account management, and claims handling. Through our catalogue and platform, we provide visibility into sourcing origins and product information, helping chefs make informed purchasing decisions and discover trusted suppliers worldwide.

We recently closed a €20M Series A backed by leading European venture funds. Our vision is to build the modern infrastructure layer for foodservice commerce - building the new standard for how the world sources food.



About the role:

Own Saltz.App http://Saltz.App expansion in your city! You’ll find and contact new venues, meet chefs and managers, show how the app works, and support their orders, from cozy lunch spots to Michelin-level places. We’ll train you, and give you room to own your day and your results.

You don't need a sales degree, you need grit, passion for gastronomy, and the drive to grow.

 

What your days will look like:

 - You’ll be out in the field, visiting restaurants and kitchens. Your mission is to introduce chefs and owners to a marketplace that actually makes their lives easier

 - You’ll manage about 10–15 meetings a week and you’ll be responsible for following up and making sure no one is left hanging

 - You will plan your weekly schedule (with guidance when needed) and work towards hitting or exceeding targets

 - You’ll show chefs a demo of our application, in their own environment, how Saltz makes ordering simple and reliable

 - You’ll use our CRM (don't worry, we’ll teach you!) and other tools to keep notes on your progress so the whole team can support you

 

What you need:

 - Whether you’ve run a kitchen, managed a bar, or worked as a concierge, you understand the fast-paced world of gastronomy. Career changers are welcomed! If you’ve done sales internships or part-time customer roles, that’s a huge plus too

 - You’re energized by being out in the field, walking into kitchens, and building face-to-face relationships with chefs and managers

 - Very good oral and written German and English skills

 - You’re comfortable leading a conversation. You know how to listen, solve problems, and confidently seal the deal

 - Bonus: You speak other languages fluently in addition to German or English

 

What you get:

 

 - OTE 48.000€ - 52.000€+ and it is uncapped, so your earnings grow with your performance. Base: 36.000€ - 40.000€

 - 30 days of paid time off - because recharging is part of performing at your best

 - front-row access to the gastronomy world: from new restaurant openings and tastings to pop-up events, you'll be close in the industry you're selling to

 - The hardware you need to get started

 - A company card to cover commuting costs (€200 per month)

 - Autonomy and trust to manage your own workflow

 - Work with and be supported by mature, intelligent, entrepreneurial and fun people who are leading experts in their fields, driven by their passion for the industry

 - A great place to build your first sales career, as you'll learn by doing, hit real milestones, and have people around you who've done it before
   
    

Interview Process

We aim to keep our process fast, transparent, and focused on getting to know you.

 1. Intro Chat (30 min) – A conversation with our Talent Acquisition Manager to learn more about you, your motivations, and what you're looking for next.

 2. Deep Dive (60 min) – A discussion with our Head of Sales to explore your previous experience, sales approach, and how you think about building and growing revenue.

source_jobs.title: Junior Sales Manager (m/w/d) im Außendienst
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US:

Saltz is an online food marketplace serving restaurants across multiple European markets. We help chefs and restaurants discover and source products from trusted local and international suppliers.


At Saltz, we believe the best ingredients should be accessible through one seamless marketplace experience. Restaurants purchase directly from Saltz and are fully supported across sales, logistics, customer support, account management, and claims handling. Through our catalogue and platform, we provide visibility into sourcing origins and product information, helping chefs make informed purchasing decisions and discover trusted suppliers worldwide.

We recently closed a €20M Series A backed by leading European venture funds. Our vision is to build the modern infrastructure layer for foodservice commerce - building the new standard for how the world sources food.



Über die Rolle:

Baue Saltz.App http://Saltz.App in deiner Stadt auf! Du findest neue Gastronomiebetriebe, triffst Köch:innen und Manager:innen, erklärst die App und unterstützt sie bei ihren Bestellungen – vom gemütlichen Lunchlokal bis hin zur Michelin-prämierten Küche. Wir coachen dich umfassend und geben dir den Freiraum, deinen Arbeitstag und deine Ergebnisse eigenverantwortlich zu gestalten.

Du brauchst keine klassische Sales Erfahrung – was zählt, sind Biss, Leidenschaft für Gastronomie und der Wille zu wachsen.



So sieht dein Arbeitsalltag aus:

 - Du bist überwiegend im Außendienst unterwegs und besuchst Restaurants und Küchen. Deine Mission: Köch:innen und Inhaber:innen einen Marktplatz vorzustellen, der ihren Alltag wirklich erleichtert

 - Du führst etwa 10–15 Termine pro Woche und bist verantwortlich für konsequente Nachverfolgung

 - Du planst deine Woche selbstständig (mit Unterstützung, wenn nötig) und arbeitest darauf hin, deine Ziele zu erreichen oder zu übertreffen

 - Du präsentierst Köch:innen Live-Demos der Saltz-App direkt in ihrem Arbeitsumfeld

 - Du nutzt unser CRM-System (keine Sorge, das bringen wir dir bei!) und weitere Tools, um deinen Fortschritt zu dokumentieren und dem Team Transparenz zu geben
   
   

Das bringst du mit:

 - Ob du selbst in der Küche gearbeitet, eine Bar geleitet oder als Concierge gearbeitet hast – du kennst die schnelllebige Welt der Gastronomie
   Quereinsteiger:innen sind willkommen!

 - Erste Erfahrungen im Sales oder kundenorientierten Nebenjobs sind ein großes Plus

 - Du hast Freude daran, unterwegs zu sein, Küchen zu betreten und persönliche Beziehungen zu Köch:innen und Manager:innen aufzubauen

 - Sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift

 - Du kannst Gespräche souverän führen, gut zuhören, Probleme lösen und sicher auftreten

 - Bonus: Du sprichst weitere Sprachen fließend neben Deutsch oder Englisch



Das bieten wir dir:

 - OTE 48.000€ - 52.000€ (ungedeckelt) – dein Gehalt wächst mit deiner Performance
   Fixgehalt: 36.000€ - 40.000€

 - 30 Tage Urlaub – weil gute Performance auch Erholung braucht

 - Die notwendige Hardware für deinen Start

 - Firmenkarte für deine Fahrtkosten (200 € pro Monat)

 - Viel Eigenverantwortung und Vertrauen in deine Arbeitsweise

 - Arbeite mit erfahrenen, unternehmerisch denkenden und leidenschaftlichen Kolleg:innen, von denen du viel lernen kannst

 - Der perfekte Einstieg in deine Sales-Karriere: Learning by doing, echte Meilensteine und ein Team, das diesen Weg schon gegangen ist

 - Mittendrin in der Gastro-Szene: von Restaurant-Openings über Tastings bis zu Pop-ups – du bist nah an der Branche, an die du verkaufst



Interviewprozess

Unser Ziel ist es, den Prozess schnell, transparent und darauf fokussiert zu halten, dich wirklich kennenzulernen.

1. Intro-Chat (30 Min.) – Ein Gespräch mit unserem Talent Acquisition Manager, um mehr über dich, deine Motivation und deine nächsten beruflichen Ziele zu erfahren.

2. Deep Dive (60 Min.) – Ein Gespräch mit unserem Head of Sales, in dem wir tiefer in deine bisherigen Erfahrungen sowie dein
